creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
This port has no maintainer.

Thomas, do you want to take over maintainership?
If yes, just post a followup to this PR.

Anyway, I am preparing this for commit.

P.S:
If
MASTER_SITES = ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
and
MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR = ${PORTNAME}
we use the shortcut form
MASTER_SITES = SF
